emails.subject: Ontario Power Generation
emails.body: Per conv. a minute ago with Marcus, Christi Nicolay in the Regulatory Group just checked and Ontario Power Generation does not have a FERC marketing license. That leaves them to buying US power only (both east west OK). Please make this change immediately. Thanks!
